name: stage2_domain_expansion_and_fusion
objective: Improve elevated-risk recall and deployment robustness by combining image features with Stage 1 signals and body location.

quality_controls: flag uncertain labels and exclude from first-pass benchmark

evaluation_guardrails: track elevated recall as primary safety metric
track false negative count and review images
report subgroup metrics by body_location and source domain

stage2_fusion_model_v1.architecture: concatenate -> small MLP -> two binary heads (infection_risk_binary, urgency_binary)
training_notes: retain fixed split policy for benchmark comparability
use class weighting or focal loss if elevated recall is low
tune elevated decision threshold on validation set

inference_output_requirements: return uncertain flag when probability is near threshold
release_policy.safety_rule: if confidence is low or uncertain band is hit, escalate to watch/clinical evaluation rather than benign output
